label: Random epic quest comp
description: Fires random epic quests on an on/off cycle. Extends OnOffCycle with no additional fields.

Class.label: Properties class
Class.description: C# StorytellerCompProperties type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

minDaysPassed.label: Min days passed
minDaysPassed.description: Earliest in-game day on which this comp can fire.

allowedTargetTags.label: Allowed target tags
allowedTargetTags.description: Restrict this comp to firing at incident targets with one of these tags.

disallowedTargetTags.label: Disallowed target tags
disallowedTargetTags.description: Exclude incident targets with any of these tags.

minIncChancePopulationIntentFactor.label: Min inc chance population intent factor
minIncChancePopulationIntentFactor.description: Minimum population-intent multiplier applied to incident chance.

enableIfAnyModActive.label: Enable if any mod active
enableIfAnyModActive.description: This comp is active only when at least one mod in this list is loaded.

disableIfAnyModActive.label: Disable if any mod active
disableIfAnyModActive.description: This comp is disabled when any mod in this list is loaded.

onDays.label: On days
onDays.description: Duration in days of the active quest phase.

offDays.label: Off days
offDays.description: Duration in days of the quiet phase.

onDaysNoTreeConnectors.label: On days (no tree connectors)
onDaysNoTreeConnectors.description: On-days override when no Gauranlen tree connectors are present.

offDaysNoTreeConnectors.label: Off days (no tree connectors)
offDaysNoTreeConnectors.description: Off-days override when no Gauranlen tree connectors are present.

minSpacingDays.label: Min spacing days
minSpacingDays.description: Minimum days between two incidents from this comp.

numIncidentsRange.label: Num incidents range
numIncidentsRange.description: Number of incidents per on-phase, sampled from this range.

acceptFractionByDaysPassedCurve.label: Accept fraction by days passed curve
acceptFractionByDaysPassedCurve.description: Probability multiplier based on days elapsed. X = days, Y = fraction.

acceptPercentFactorPerThreatPointsCurve.label: Accept percent factor per threat points curve
acceptPercentFactorPerThreatPointsCurve.description: Probability multiplier based on incident threat points. X = points, Y = factor.

acceptPercentFactorPerProgressScoreCurve.label: Accept percent factor per progress score curve
acceptPercentFactorPerProgressScoreCurve.description: Probability multiplier based on colony progress score. X = score, Y = factor.

incident.label: Incident
incident.description: Specific IncidentDef to fire. Mutually exclusive with category.

category.label: Category
category.description: IncidentCategoryDef from which a random incident is chosen. Mutually exclusive with incident.

forceRaidEnemyBeforeDaysPassed.label: Force raid enemy before days passed
forceRaidEnemyBeforeDaysPassed.description: Forces a raid enemy incident if none has fired before this many days.
